---
title: "maldives_manuscript"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-12"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# Load Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(vegan) 
library(dplyr)
library(scales) 
library(grid) 
library(phyloseq) 
library(grafify) 
library(microbiome) 
library(dunn.test) 
library(stats) 
library(ggordiplots) 
library(DescTools) 
library(ANCOMBC) 
library(ggrepel)    
library(compositions)
library(writexl)
library(patchwork)
library(stringr)
library(openxlsx)
library(tidytext) 
library(ggraph)
library(tidygraph)
library(phyloseq)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(igraph)
library(Hmisc)   
library(knitr)
library(ape)
library(phangorn)   
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(rstatix)
library(ggvenn)
library(eulerr)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggvenn)
library(eulerr)
library(ggVennDiagram)
library(ggforce)
```


#Working directory and Load Data
```{r}
dirS <- "/Users/lara_kalisch/Desktop/maldives_manuscript1"
setwd(dirS)
getwd()

## THEME SETTING####
theme_set(theme_bw())
### IMPORTING AND PREPARING DATA####
ASVsS <- read.table("ASVs_counts-no-contam.tsv",
                     header = TRUE,
                     row.names = 1,
                     sep = "\t",
                     check.names = FALSE)

### Import taxonomy table
taxfileS <- read.table("ASVs_taxonomy-no-contam.tsv",
                      header = TRUE,
                      row.names = 1,
                      sep = "\t",
                      check.names = FALSE)

### Import metadata
mapfileS <- read.csv("meta_maldives.csv",
                     header = TRUE,
                     row.names = 1,
                     check.names = FALSE)


# sanity check
table(mapfileS$sample_type, useNA = "ifany")
```

#Phyloseq
```{r}
# Ensure correct object classes
taxfileS <- as.matrix(taxfileS)
mapfileS <- as.data.frame(mapfileS)
ASVsS <- as.matrix(ASVsS)

# Create phyloseq object
phy_mw <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(ASVsS, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
  tax_table(taxfileS),
  sample_data(mapfileS)
)

# Remove non-bacterial contaminants and singletons
phy_mw <- phy_mw %>%
  subset_taxa(
    Kingdom == "Bacteria" &
      Family != "Mitochondria" &
      Order != "Chloroplast"
  ) %>%
  prune_taxa(taxa_sums(.) > 1, .)

# Standardize sample_type metadata
sample_data(phy_mw)$sample_type <- sample_data(phy_mw)$sample_type |>
  as.character() |>
  trimws() |>
  tolower() |>
  factor(levels = c("colon", "cloaca"))

# Save cleaned full object
saveRDS(phy_mw, file = "phy_mw_clean_full.rds")

# Extract turtle ID from sample names and subset to EI < 49
ei_num <- as.numeric(sub("^EI([0-9]+).*", "\\1", sample_names(phy_mw)))

phy_mw <- phy_mw %>%
  prune_samples(ei_num < 49, .) %>%
  prune_samples(sample_sums(.) > 0, .) %>%
  prune_taxa(taxa_sums(.) > 0, .)

# Save filtered object
saveRDS(phy_mw, file = "phy_mw_pre49.rds")

phy_mw

```

#Rarifaction
```{r}

otu_mw <- otu_table(phy_mw)
otu_mw <- as.data.frame(t(as(otu_mw, "matrix")))  

vegan::rarecurve(
  otu_mw,
  step  = 10000,
  label = TRUE
)

# Check sequencing depth
summary(sample_sums(phy_mw))
table(sample_sums(phy_mw) < 50000)
low_depth_ids <- sample_names(phy_mw)[sample_sums(phy_mw) < 50000]
table(sample_data(phy_mw)[low_depth_ids, "sample_type"])

# Rarefy at the minimum sequencing depth to retain all samples,
# as higher thresholds would disproportionately exclude cloacal samples

set.seed(42)
rar_mw <- rarefy_even_depth(
  phy_mw,
  sample.size = 45815,
  rngseed     = 42,
  replace     = FALSE,
  verbose     = TRUE
)

# Remove taxa (ASVs) with zero counts after rarefaction
rar_mw <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(rar_mw) > 0, rar_mw)

# Quick checks
rar_mw
ntaxa(rar_mw)
summary(sample_sums(rar_mw))
levels(sample_data(rar_mw)$sample_type)

# Save rarefied object
saveRDS(rar_mw, "rar_mw_pre49.rds")

### Basic info
ntaxa(phy_mw)
nsamples(phy_mw)
summary(sample_sums(phy_mw))
 
```
#Basic Stats

```{r}
track <- read.delim("read-count-tracking.tsv", row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)  
raw_reads <- sum(track$dada2_input, na.rm = TRUE)
raw_reads
nonchim_reads <- sum(track$nonchim, na.rm = TRUE)
nonchim_reads
perc_retained <- (nonchim_reads / raw_reads) * 100
perc_retained
round(perc_retained, 1)

```

#Alpha Diversity 

```{r}
## Alpha diversity (rarefied data)


# Estimate alpha diversity metrics
alpha_mw <- estimate_richness(
  rar_mw,
  measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon", "Simpson")
) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("sample_ID")

# Add metadata
meta_mw_df <- as(sample_data(rar_mw), "data.frame") %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("sample_ID")

alpha_mw_df <- dplyr::left_join(alpha_mw, meta_mw_df, by = "sample_ID") %>%
  dplyr::filter(sample_type %in% c("colon", "cloaca")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    SampleType = factor(sample_type, levels = c("colon", "cloaca"))
  )

# Basic checks
table(alpha_mw_df$SampleType)
stopifnot(all(c("colon", "cloaca") %in% alpha_mw_df$SampleType))


# Summary statistics by sample type
alpha_summary_mw <- alpha_mw_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(SampleType) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    dplyr::across(
      c(Observed, Chao1, Shannon, Simpson),
      list(
        mean   = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        median = ~median(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd     = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  alpha_summary_mw,
  "MW_Alpha_diversity_summary_colon_vs_cloaca.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Reshape to wide format for paired testing
alpha_wide <- alpha_mw_df %>%
  dplyr::select(turtle_ID, SampleType, Observed, Chao1, Shannon, Simpson) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = SampleType,
    values_from = c(Observed, Chao1, Shannon, Simpson)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na()

# Check number of complete pairs
nrow(alpha_wide)

# Paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests
wilcox_results <- data.frame(
  metric = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon", "Simpson"),
  p_value = c(
    wilcox.test(alpha_wide$Observed_colon, alpha_wide$Observed_cloaca, paired = TRUE)$p.value,
    wilcox.test(alpha_wide$Chao1_colon,   alpha_wide$Chao1_cloaca,   paired = TRUE)$p.value,
    wilcox.test(alpha_wide$Shannon_colon, alpha_wide$Shannon_cloaca, paired = TRUE)$p.value,
    wilcox.test(alpha_wide$Simpson_colon, alpha_wide$Simpson_cloaca, paired = TRUE)$p.value
  )
)

wilcox_results$p_adj <- p.adjust(wilcox_results$p_value, method = "BH")

write.csv(
  wilcox_results,
  "MW_Alpha_Wilcoxon_Paired_Results.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Save per-sample alpha diversity table
write.csv(
  alpha_mw_df,
  "MW_Alpha_diversity_rarefied_per_sample.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

### Alpha diversity plot 

levels(alpha_long_mw$SampleType)

comparisons <- list(
  c("colon","cloaca")
)

p_alpha_mw_white <- ggplot(
  alpha_long_mw,
  aes(x = SampleType, y = value, fill = SampleType)
) +
  
  geom_boxplot(
    outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.9,
    colour = "black",
    width = 0.65
  ) +
  
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    size = 1.8,
    alpha = 0.75,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    label = "p.signif",
    hide.ns = TRUE,
    step.increase = 0.15,   # more vertical space for stars
    size = 5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ index, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "colon"  = "#009E73",
      "cloaca" = "#7B4EA3"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(colour = "black"),
    
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    
    strip.text = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      colour = "black",
      size = 16,
      margin = margin(b = 8)   # space between facet title and stars
    ),
    
    strip.background = element_blank(),   # removes grey boxes
    
    plot.title = element_text(
      margin = margin(b = 20)   # space between title and panels
    ),
    
    panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines")
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Alpha diversity of wild Maldives sea turtles",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  )
p_alpha_mw_white


#Save 
ggsave(
  "MW_alpha_diversity_colon_vs_cloaca_white.png",
  p_alpha_mw_white,
  width = 17,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "MW_alpha_diversity_colon_vs_cloaca_white.svg",
  p_alpha_mw_white,
  width = 17,
  height = 5,
  device = "svg",
  bg = "white"
)

```


#Beta Diversity
##Aitchision
```{r}
##  Aitchison distance (CLR-transformed ASV table)

# Subset to colon and cloaca samples only
phy_beta_mw <- phy_mw %>%
  subset_samples(sample_type %in% c("colon", "cloaca")) %>%
  prune_samples(sample_sums(.) > 0, .) %>%
  prune_taxa(taxa_sums(.) > 0, .)

# Basic checks
stopifnot(sum(is.na(sample_data(phy_beta_mw)$sample_type)) == 0)
stopifnot(nsamples(phy_beta_mw) == 96)

# CLR transform
phy_beta_mw_clr <- transform(phy_beta_mw, "clr")

# Extract CLR matrix (samples × ASVs)
otu_mat <- as(otu_table(phy_beta_mw_clr), "matrix")
if (taxa_are_rows(phy_beta_mw_clr)) {
  otu_mat <- t(otu_mat)
}

stopifnot(identical(rownames(otu_mat), sample_names(phy_beta_mw_clr)))

# Aitchison distance
dist_aitch_mw <- dist(otu_mat, method = "euclidean")

# Metadata
meta_mw <- data.frame(sample_data(phy_beta_mw_clr))

# PERMANOVA (paired design blocked by turtle_ID)
set.seed(42)
adonis_aitch_mw <- adonis2(
  dist_aitch_mw ~ sample_type,
  data = meta_mw,
  permutations = 999,
  strata = meta_mw$turtle_ID
)

adonis_aitch_mw

# Homogeneity of dispersion
set.seed(42)
disp_aitch_mw <- betadisper(dist_aitch_mw, meta_mw$sample_type)
permutest(disp_aitch_mw, permutations = 999)
anova(disp_aitch_mw)

## PCA for visualization
ord <- prcomp(otu_mat, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
eig <- ord$sdev^2 / sum(ord$sdev^2) * 100

# Clean sample type labels
clean_sample_type <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    as.character() %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("\u00A0", " ") %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>%
    trimws() %>%
    tolower()
}

# Sample scores
df_plot <- data.frame(
  sample_ID = rownames(otu_mat),
  turtle_ID = meta_mw$turtle_ID,
  PC1 = ord$x[, 1],
  PC2 = ord$x[, 2],
  sample_type = meta_mw$sample_type
) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleType = factor(
      clean_sample_type(sample_type),
      levels = c("colon", "cloaca")
    )
  )

# Sanity checks
stopifnot(nrow(df_plot) == 96)
stopifnot(sum(is.na(df_plot$SampleType)) == 0)

# PCA loadings
loadings <- as.data.frame(ord$rotation) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("ASV")

tax <- as.data.frame(tax_table(phy_beta_mw_clr)) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("ASV")

# Select top genus/family drivers
top_taxa <- loadings %>%
  left_join(tax, by = "ASV") %>%
  mutate(
    Genus  = ifelse(tolower(Genus) %in% c("unclassified", "unknown", ""), NA, Genus),
    Family = ifelse(tolower(Family) %in% c("unclassified", "unknown", ""), NA, Family),
    label  = ifelse(!is.na(Genus), Genus, Family),
    label  = stringr::str_replace_all(label, "_", " ")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(label)) %>%
  group_by(label) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(PC1), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(PC1))) %>%
  slice(1:6)

# Scale arrows for plotting
arrow_mult <- quantile(abs(c(df_plot$PC1, df_plot$PC2)), 0.9) * 8

top_taxa <- top_taxa %>%
  mutate(
    PC1_plot = PC1 * arrow_mult,
    PC2_plot = PC2 * arrow_mult
  )

# Plot
p_MW <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(PC1, PC2)) +
  stat_ellipse(
    aes(colour = SampleType),
    type = "t",
    level = 0.95,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(colour = SampleType),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = top_taxa,
    aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1_plot, yend = PC2_plot),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    colour = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = top_taxa,
    aes(x = PC1_plot, y = PC2_plot, label = label),
    size = 3.8,
    fontface = "italic",
    box.padding = 0.5,
    segment.color = NA,
    bg.color = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15,
    max.overlaps = 50,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "colon"  = "#009E73",
      "cloaca" = "#7B4EA3"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(
    title = "Aitchison PCA of Wild Maldives Sea Turtles",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(eig[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(eig[2], 1), "%)"),
    colour = "Sample type"
  )

p_MW

# Save figure
ggsave(
  "MW_Aitchison_PCA_colon_vs_cloaca_genus_loadings.png",
  p_MW,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "MW_Aitchison_PCA_colon_vs_cloaca_genus_loadings.svg",
  p_MW,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  device = "svg"
)

# Save loading tables
loading_table <- loadings %>%
  left_join(tax, by = "ASV") %>%
  mutate(
    Genus = ifelse(is.na(Genus) | Genus == "", "Unclassified", Genus),
    abs_PC1 = abs(PC1),
    abs_PC2 = abs(PC2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_PC1)) %>%
  select(ASV, Genus, Family, PC1, PC2, abs_PC1, abs_PC2)

write.csv(
  loading_table,
  "MW_Aitchison_PCA_Genus_Loadings.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  loading_table %>% slice(1:20),
  "MW_Aitchison_PCA_Top20_Genus_Loadings.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


#Taxonomy
##Phyla

```{r}

phy_phylum <- phy_mw %>%
  prune_taxa(taxa_sums(.) > 0, .) %>%
  tax_glom(taxrank = "Phylum", NArm = FALSE)

# Convert to relative abundance
phy_phylum_rel <- transform_sample_counts(phy_phylum, function(x) x / sum(x))

# Melt to long format and clean labels
df_phylum <- psmelt(phy_phylum_rel) %>%
  mutate(
    Phylum = as.character(Phylum),
    Phylum = ifelse(is.na(Phylum) | Phylum == "", "Unclassified", Phylum),
    sample_type = tolower(trimws(as.character(sample_type)))
  )

## Color palette
base_pastel <- c(
  "#9AD0EC", "#FBC4AB", "#B5EAD7", "#FFAFCC", "#CDB4DB",
  "#E4C1F9", "#FFF1A8", "#CED4DA", "#BEE7E8", "#FFD6A5",
  "#CAFFBF", "#FDFFB6", "#FFC6FF", "#BDB2FF", "#EAE4E9",
  "#F1FAEE", "#E9C46A", "#F4A261", "#84A59D", "#B8F2E6"
)

## Top phyla for plotting
topN <- 10

top_phyla <- df_phylum %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarise(mean_abund = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_abund)) %>%
  slice_head(n = topN) %>%
  pull(Phylum)

df_phylum <- df_phylum %>%
  mutate(
    Phylum_plot = ifelse(Phylum %in% top_phyla, Phylum, "Other")
  )

phyla_levels <- sort(unique(df_phylum$Phylum_plot))
phyla_levels <- phyla_levels[phyla_levels != "Other"]

phyla_colors <- setNames(
  base_pastel[seq_along(phyla_levels)],
  phyla_levels
)

phyla_colors <- c(phyla_colors, Other = "grey85")
phyla_colors["Pseudomonadota"] <- "#8DA0CB"

## Mean composition by sample type
df_phylum_mean <- df_phylum %>%
  group_by(Sample, sample_type, Phylum_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Sample, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(Abundance = Abundance / sum(Abundance)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sample_type, Phylum_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

p_phylum_mean <- ggplot(
  df_phylum_mean,
  aes(x = sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Phylum_plot)
) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phyla_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("colon", "cloaca")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(
    title = "Phylum-level gut microbiome composition (mean)",
    subtitle = paste0("Top ", topN, " phyla; remaining collapsed as Other"),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean relative abundance",
    fill = "Phylum"
  )

ggsave(
  "MW_Phylum_mean_colon_vs_cloaca.png",
  p_phylum_mean,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 400
)

ggsave(
  "MW_Phylum_mean_colon_vs_cloaca.svg",
  p_phylum_mean,
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)

## Per-sample composition
df_phylum_ind <- df_phylum %>%
  group_by(Sample, sample_type, turtle_ID, Phylum_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    turtle_num = as.numeric(gsub("\\D+", "", turtle_ID)),
    Sample_label = paste0(turtle_ID, "_", sample_type)
  )

sample_order <- df_phylum_ind %>%
  distinct(Sample_label, turtle_num, sample_type) %>%
  arrange(sample_type, turtle_num) %>%
  pull(Sample_label)

df_phylum_ind$Sample_label <- factor(df_phylum_ind$Sample_label, levels = sample_order)

p_phylum_all <- ggplot(
  df_phylum_ind,
  aes(x = Sample_label, y = Abundance, fill = Phylum_plot)
) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phyla_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~sample_type, scales = "free_x", nrow = 2) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 5),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Phylum-level composition per sample",
    subtitle = "Samples ordered by turtle ID; colon and cloaca shown separately",
    x = "Turtle ID",
    y = "Relative abundance",
    fill = "Phylum"
  )

ggsave(
  "MW_Phylum_individual_all.png",
  p_phylum_all,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 400,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "MW_Phylum_individual_all.svg",
  p_phylum_all,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  device = "svg"
)


## Export phylum summary tables
top_phyla_tables <- df_phylum %>%
  group_by(sample_type, Phylum) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_abundance = mean(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_abundance = sd(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_samples = sum(!is.na(Abundance)),
    se_abundance = sd_abundance / sqrt(n_samples),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(sample_type) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_abundance), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  filter(rank <= 20) %>%
  ungroup()

write.csv(
  top_phyla_tables,
  "MW_Top20_Phyla_per_sample_type.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)


## Paired Wilcoxon tests by phylum
df_phylum_clean <- df_phylum %>%
  group_by(turtle_ID, sample_type, Phylum) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

df_phylum_wide <- df_phylum_clean %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_type,
    values_from = Abundance
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(colon) & !is.na(cloaca))

phylum_wilcox_results <- lapply(unique(df_phylum_wide$Phylum), function(p) {
  sub <- df_phylum_wide[df_phylum_wide$Phylum == p, ]

  test <- wilcox.test(
    sub$colon,
    sub$cloaca,
    paired = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    Phylum = p,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
}) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

phylum_wilcox_results$p_adj <- p.adjust(phylum_wilcox_results$p_value, method = "BH")

phylum_means <- df_phylum_clean %>%
  group_by(sample_type, Phylum) %>%
  summarise(mean_abundance = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = mean_abundance)

phylum_stats <- phylum_wilcox_results %>%
  left_join(phylum_means, by = "Phylum") %>%
  mutate(
    higher_in = ifelse(colon > cloaca, "colon", "cloaca")
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

phylum_stats

writexl::write_xlsx(
  phylum_stats,
  "MW_Wild_Phyla_Paired_Wilcoxon.xlsx"
)

#Merge tables
# Reshape abundance summary table to wide format
phylum_summary_wide <- top_phyla_tables %>%
  select(sample_type, Phylum, mean_abundance, sd_abundance, se_abundance) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_type,
    values_from = c(mean_abundance, sd_abundance, se_abundance)
  )

# Merge summary abundances with paired Wilcoxon results
phylum_supp_table <- phylum_summary_wide %>%
  left_join(
    phylum_stats %>%
      select(Phylum, p_value, p_adj, higher_in),
    by = "Phylum"
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# View merged table
phylum_supp_table

# Save merged supplementary table
write.csv(
  phylum_supp_table,
  "MW_SuppTable_Phyla_Abundance_and_Wilcoxon.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

writexl::write_xlsx(
  phylum_supp_table,
  "MW_SuppTable_Phyla_Abundance_and_Wilcoxon.xlsx"
)
```


##Families
```{r}

# Agglomerate at family level
phy_family <- phy_mw %>%
  prune_taxa(taxa_sums(.) > 0, .) %>%
  tax_glom(taxrank = "Family", NArm = FALSE)

# Convert to relative abundance
phy_family_rel <- transform_sample_counts(phy_family, function(x) x / sum(x))

# Melt and clean labels
df_family <- psmelt(phy_family_rel) %>%
  mutate(
    Family = as.character(Family),
    Family = ifelse(is.na(Family) | Family == "", "Unclassified", Family),
    sample_type = tolower(trimws(as.character(sample_type)))
  )

## Top families for plotting
topN <- 20

top_fams <- df_family %>%
  group_by(Family) %>%
  summarise(mean_abund = mean(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_abund)) %>%
  slice_head(n = topN) %>%
  pull(Family)

df_family <- df_family %>%
  mutate(
    Family_plot = ifelse(Family %in% top_fams, Family, "Other")
  )

## Family colors
family_levels <- sort(unique(df_family$Family_plot))
family_levels <- family_levels[family_levels != "Other"]

family_colors <- setNames(
  base_pastel[seq_along(family_levels)],
  family_levels
)

family_colors <- c(family_colors, Other = "grey85")
family_colors["Marinifilaceae"] <- "#8DA0CB"

## Mean composition by sample type
df_family_mean <- df_family %>%
  group_by(Sample, sample_type, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Sample, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(Abundance = Abundance / sum(Abundance)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sample_type, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop")
df_family_mean <- df_family_mean %>%
  mutate(
    Family_plot = factor(
      Family_plot,
      levels = c("Other", setdiff(unique(Family_plot), "Other"))
    )
  )

p_family_mean <- ggplot(
  df_family_mean,
  aes(x = sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Family_plot)
) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = family_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("colon", "cloaca")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(
    title = "Family-level gut microbiome composition (mean)",
    subtitle = paste0("Top ", topN, " families shown; remaining collapsed as Other"),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean relative abundance",
    fill = "Family"
  )

ggsave(
  "MW_Family_mean_colon_vs_cloaca.png",
  p_family_mean,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 400,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "MW_Family_mean_colon_vs_cloaca.svg",
  p_family_mean,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  device = "svg"
)

## Per-sample composition
df_family_ind <- df_family %>%
  group_by(Sample, sample_type, turtle_ID, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    turtle_num = as.numeric(gsub("\\D+", "", turtle_ID)),
    Sample_label = paste0(turtle_ID, "_", sample_type)
  )

sample_order <- df_family_ind %>%
  distinct(Sample_label, turtle_num, sample_type) %>%
  arrange(turtle_num, sample_type) %>%
  pull(Sample_label)

df_family_ind$Sample_label <- factor(df_family_ind$Sample_label, levels = sample_order)

p_family_all <- ggplot(
  df_family_ind,
  aes(x = Sample_label, y = Abundance, fill = Family_plot)
) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = family_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~sample_type, scales = "free_x", nrow = 2) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 5),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Family-level composition per sample",
    subtitle = "Samples ordered by turtle ID; colon and cloaca shown separately",
    x = "Turtle ID",
    y = "Relative abundance",
    fill = "Family"
  )

ggsave(
  "MW_Family_individual_all.png",
  p_family_all,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 400,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "MW_Family_individual_all.svg",
  p_family_all,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  device = "svg"
)

## Full family summary table
family_summary_full <- df_family %>%
  group_by(sample_type, Family) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_abundance = mean(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_abundance = sd(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_samples = n_distinct(Sample),
    se_abundance = sd_abundance / sqrt(n_samples),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

## Paired Wilcoxon tests by family
df_family_clean <- df_family %>%
  group_by(turtle_ID, sample_type, Family) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

df_family_wide <- df_family_clean %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_type,
    values_from = Abundance
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(colon) & !is.na(cloaca))

family_stats <- lapply(unique(df_family_wide$Family), function(fam) {
  sub <- df_family_wide[df_family_wide$Family == fam, ]

  test <- wilcox.test(
    sub$colon,
    sub$cloaca,
    paired = TRUE,
    exact = FALSE
  )

  data.frame(
    Family = fam,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
}) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

family_stats$p_adj <- p.adjust(family_stats$p_value, method = "BH")

family_means <- df_family_clean %>%
  group_by(sample_type, Family) %>%
  summarise(mean_abundance = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_type,
    values_from = mean_abundance
  )

family_stats <- family_stats %>%
  left_join(family_means, by = "Family") %>%
  mutate(
    higher_in = ifelse(colon > cloaca, "colon", "cloaca"),
    diff = colon - cloaca,
    abs_diff = abs(diff)
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

## Merge full abundance summary with Wilcoxon results
family_summary_wide <- family_summary_full %>%
  select(sample_type, Family, mean_abundance, sd_abundance, se_abundance) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_type,
    values_from = c(mean_abundance, sd_abundance, se_abundance)
  )

family_supp_table <- family_summary_wide %>%
  left_join(
    family_stats %>%
      select(Family, p_value, p_adj, higher_in),
    by = "Family"
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Save final supplementary table
write.csv(
  family_supp_table,
  "MW_SuppTable_Families_Abundance_and_Wilcoxon.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

writexl::write_xlsx(
  family_supp_table,
  "MW_SuppTable_Families_Abundance_and_Wilcoxon.xlsx"
)

## Top 20 significant family differences
family_top20 <- family_stats %>%
  filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_diff)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

family_top20
```

##Genus
```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1. Prepare genus-level data
# -----------------------------
topN <- 30

phy_genus_rel <- phy_mw %>%
  subset_samples(sample_type %in% c("colon", "cloaca")) %>%
  prune_samples(sample_sums(.) > 0, .) %>%
  prune_taxa(taxa_sums(.) > 0, .) %>%
  tax_glom(taxrank = "Genus", NArm = FALSE) %>%
  transform_sample_counts(function(x) x / sum(x))

df_genus <- psmelt(phy_genus_rel) %>%
  mutate(
    Genus = as.character(Genus),
    Genus = if_else(is.na(Genus) | Genus == "", "Unclassified", Genus),
    sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("colon", "cloaca"))
  )


# 2. Summary stats + Wilcoxon 

# agglomaerat per turtle
df_genus_clean <- df_genus %>%
  group_by(turtle_ID, sample_type, Genus) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

# Summary stats (mean ± SE)
genus_summary <- df_genus_clean %>%
  group_by(sample_type, Genus) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_abundance = mean(Abundance),
    sd_abundance   = sd(Abundance),
    n_samples      = n(),
    se_abundance   = sd_abundance / sqrt(n_samples),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_pct = mean_abundance * 100,
    se_pct   = se_abundance * 100
  )

# Pivot summary to wide (colon vs cloaca side-by-side)
genus_summary_wide <- genus_summary %>%
  select(sample_type, Genus, mean_pct, se_pct) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample_type,
    values_from = c(mean_pct, se_pct)
  )

# -----------------------------
# Paired Wilcoxon
# -----------------------------
df_genus_wide <- df_genus_clean %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = sample_type,
    values_from = Abundance
  ) %>%
  drop_na(colon, cloaca)

genus_wilcox <- df_genus_wide %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    test <- wilcox.test(.x$colon, .x$cloaca, paired = TRUE)
    tibble(p_value = test$p.value)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

# Mean values for direction + effect size
genus_means <- df_genus_wide %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>%
  summarise(
    colon = mean(colon),
    cloaca = mean(cloaca),
    mean_diff = abs(colon - cloaca),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    higher_in = if_else(colon > cloaca, "colon", "cloaca")
  )


# final table
genus_final <- genus_summary_wide %>%
  left_join(genus_wilcox, by = "Genus") %>%
  left_join(genus_means, by = "Genus") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_diff))

# Top 50 + All genera

top50_genera <- genus_final %>%
  slice_head(n = 50)


# Export
writexl::write_xlsx(
  list(
    Top50 = top50_genera,
    All_genera = genus_final
  ),
  "MW_Genus_Final_COLON_vs_CLOACA.xlsx"
)

```

##ASV Venn Diagram
```{r}


# Use same filtered phyloseq object as ANCOM
otu <- as(otu_table(phy_asv), "matrix")
if (!taxa_are_rows(phy_asv)) otu <- t(otu)

meta <- as.data.frame(sample_data(phy_asv))

colon_samples  <- rownames(meta)[meta$sample_type == "colon"]
cloaca_samples <- rownames(meta)[meta$sample_type == "cloaca"]

# ASVs present at least once in each sample type
colon_asvs <- rownames(otu)[
  rowSums(otu[, colon_samples, drop = FALSE] > 0) > 0
]

cloaca_asvs <- rownames(otu)[
  rowSums(otu[, cloaca_samples, drop = FALSE] > 0) > 0
]

# Counts
shared      <- intersect(colon_asvs, cloaca_asvs)
colon_only  <- setdiff(colon_asvs, cloaca_asvs)
cloaca_only <- setdiff(cloaca_asvs, colon_asvs)

n_colon_only  <- length(colon_only)
n_cloaca_only <- length(cloaca_only)
n_shared      <- length(shared)
total_asvs    <- length(union(colon_asvs, cloaca_asvs))

pct <- function(x) paste0(round(x / total_asvs * 100, 1), "%")

# Check numbers
data.frame(
  Category = c("Colon only", "Shared", "Cloaca only", "Total"),
  n_ASVs = c(n_colon_only, n_shared, n_cloaca_only, total_asvs),
  Percent = c(pct(n_colon_only), pct(n_shared), pct(n_cloaca_only), "100%")
)

# Manual Venn-style plot
p_venn <- ggplot() +
  # Cloaca circle: larger/top/purple
  geom_circle(
    aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0.45, r = 1.25),
    fill = "#D8C7F0",
    color = "#7B1FA2",
    alpha = 0.55,
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +
  # Colon circle: smaller/bottom/green
  geom_circle(
    aes(x0 = 0, y0 = -0.55, r = 0.95),
    fill = "#CFE8D6",
    color = "#4E8B5C",
    alpha = 0.55,
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = 1.9, label = "Cloaca",
           color = "#7B1FA2", fontface = "bold", size = 7) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = -1.65, label = "Colon",
           color = "#4E8B5C", fontface = "bold", size = 7) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0.95,
           label = paste0(n_cloaca_only, "\n(", pct(n_cloaca_only), ")"),
           size = 5.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = -0.05,
           label = paste0(n_shared, "\n(", pct(n_shared), ")"),
           size = 5.5, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = -1.0,
           label = paste0(n_colon_only, "\n(", pct(n_colon_only), ")"),
           size = 5.5) +
  labs(
    title = "ASV overlap between colon and cloacal samples",
    subtitle = paste0("Presence/absence of ASVs; total ASVs = ", total_asvs)
  ) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-1.8, 1.8), ylim = c(-2.0, 2.2)) +
  theme_void(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 18),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
  )

p_venn

ggsave(
  "ASV_overlap_colon_cloaca_venn.png",
  p_venn,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "ASV_overlap_colon_cloaca_venn.svg",
  p_venn,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  bg = "white"
)





```


#ANCOM

## ASV level

```{r}
# 1. Subset data
phy_asv <- phy_mw %>%
  subset_samples(
    species == "EI" &
      grepl("^wild", status, ignore.case = TRUE) &
      sample_type %in% c("colon", "cloaca")
  )

phy_asv <- prune_samples(sample_sums(phy_asv) > 0, phy_asv)
phy_asv <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(phy_asv) > 0, phy_asv)

# 2. Fix factor levels
sample_data(phy_asv)$sample_type <- factor(
  as.character(sample_data(phy_asv)$sample_type),
  levels = c("cloaca", "colon")
)

phy_asv <- subset_samples(phy_asv, !is.na(sample_type))

# 3. Run ANCOM-BC2
ancom_asv <- ancombc2(
  data = phy_asv,
  assay_name = "otu_table",
  tax_level = NULL,
  fix_formula = "sample_type",
  group = "sample_type",
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0.10,
  lib_cut = 1000,
  struc_zero = TRUE,
  neg_lb = TRUE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# 4. Extract results
res_asv <- ancom_asv$res %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("ASV") %>%
  mutate(
    ASV = ifelse(grepl("^ASV_", ASV), ASV, paste0("ASV_", ASV))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ASV,
    logFC    = lfc_sample_typecolon,
    se       = se_sample_typecolon,
    p_val    = p_sample_typecolon,
    q_val    = q_sample_typecolon,
    diff_abn = diff_sample_typecolon
  )

# 5. Attach taxonomy
tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(phy_asv)) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("ASV")

res_asv <- res_asv %>%
  left_join(tax_df, by = "ASV")

# 6. Create labels
res_asv <- res_asv %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus),
    ~na_if(.x, "Unclassified")
  )) %>%
  mutate(
    Label = case_when(
      !is.na(Genus)  ~ paste0(Genus, " (", ASV, ")"),
      !is.na(Family) ~ paste0("Unclassified ", Family, " (", ASV, ")"),
      !is.na(Order)  ~ paste0("Unclassified ", Order, " (", ASV, ")"),
      !is.na(Class)  ~ paste0("Unclassified ", Class, " (", ASV, ")"),
      !is.na(Phylum) ~ paste0("Unclassified ", Phylum, " (", ASV, ")"),
      TRUE           ~ paste0("ASV ", ASV)
    )
  )


# 7. Assign enrichment direction
res_asv <- res_asv %>%
  mutate(
    direction = case_when(
      diff_abn == TRUE & logFC > 0 ~ "Cloaca-enriched",
      diff_abn == TRUE & logFC < 0 ~ "Colon-enriched",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# 8. Extract significant ASVs
sig_asv <- res_asv %>%
  filter(diff_abn == TRUE) %>%
  arrange(q_val)

# 9. Save supplementary tables
writexl::write_xlsx(
  list(
    All_ASVs = res_asv,
    Significant_ASVs = sig_asv
  ),
  "ANCOMBC2_ASV_Colon_vs_Cloaca.xlsx"
)


# 10. Quick stats
n_asv_total <- nrow(res_asv)
n_asv_sig   <- sum(res_asv$diff_abn == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)

table_asv_dir <- sig_asv %>%
  count(direction)

n_asv_total
n_asv_sig
table_asv_dir

# 11. Sanity check for abundance of a known ASV
otu <- as(otu_table(phy_asv), "matrix")

if (!taxa_are_rows(phy_asv)) {
  otu <- t(otu)
}

tapply(otu["ASV_2", ], sample_data(phy_asv)$sample_type, mean)

# 12. Top 20 ASVs by effect size
top20_asv <- res_asv %>%
  filter(diff_abn == TRUE) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(logFC), n = 20, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    plot_logFC = case_when(
      direction == "Cloaca-enriched" ~  abs(logFC),
      direction == "Colon-enriched"  ~ -abs(logFC),
      TRUE ~ logFC
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(plot_logFC)

# 13. Diverging bar plot
p_ancom_asv <- ggplot(
  top20_asv,
  aes(
    x = plot_logFC,
    y = reorder(Label, plot_logFC),
    fill = direction
  )
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey40",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Colon-enriched"  = "#4E8B5C",
      "Cloaca-enriched" = "#7B1FA2"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Differentially abundant ASVs between colon and cloaca",
    subtitle = "ANCOM-BC2 results (wild E. imbricata)",
    x = "Log fold change",
    y = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  )

p_ancom_asv

ggsave(
  filename = "ANCOMBC2_colon_vs_cloaca_ASV_diverging.png",
  plot = p_ancom_asv,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  filename = "ANCOMBC2_colon_vs_cloaca_ASV_diverging.svg",
  plot = p_ancom_asv,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  bg = "white"
)
```
